title: helichrysum mixtum
intro: Helichrysum mixtum, also known as yellow feather, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of helichrysum mixtum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of helichrysum mixtum include tea, oil, and tincture, which can be used internally and topically to harness its medicinal properties.
